data.acceptance:
- Timeout value for scope refinement operations is verified to be 10 minutes (compared to current 3 minutes) via code inspection or configuration
- When a refinement operation times out or fails, an automatic retry is triggered
- Retry attempts to allocate a different agent from the refinement dispatch pool
- If no alternative agent is available, the operation fails with descriptive error messaging
- Refinement requests complete successfully when alternative agents are available for retry (verify via integration test or staging environment)
- No regression in success rate for refinement operations that previously completed within the original 3-minute timeout
- All lint, type-check, and test suite validations pass
